sentences.pinyin: Míng tiān shì nǐ de shēng rì, duì ba?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Duì! Nǐ zěn me zhī dào de?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我听小明说的。你打算怎么过？
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ tīng Xiǎo Míng shuō de. Nǐ dǎ suàn zěn me guò?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я слышал от Сяо Мина. Как ты планируешь его отметить?
sentences.text_translation_en: I heard from Xiao Ming. How do you plan to celebrate?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我想请几个朋友来家里吃饭。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng qǐng jǐ gè péng you lái jiā lǐ chī fàn.
sentences.text_translation: Bir nechta do'stimni uyga ovqatga taklif qilmoqchiman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я хочу пригласить несколько друзей домой на ужин.
sentences.text_translation_en: I want to invite a few friends over for dinner.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Bù, wǒ mā ma bāng wǒ zuò.
sentences.text_translation_en: No, my mom is helping me cook.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Qǐng le Xiǎo Zhāng, Xiǎo Wáng, hái yǒu nǐ.
sentences.text_translation: Xiao Zhang, Xiao Wang va seni taklif qildim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Пригласил Сяо Чжана, Сяо Вана и тебя.
sentences.text_translation_en: I invited Xiao Zhang, Xiao Wang, and you.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Tài hǎo le! Jǐ diǎn kāi shǐ?
sentences.text_translation_en: Great! What time does it start?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 晚上六点半。你早点来玩。
sentences.pinyin: Wǎn shang liù diǎn bàn. Nǐ zǎo diǎn lái wán.
sentences.text_translation: Kechqurun olti yarimda. Ertaroq kelib o'yna.
sentences.text_translation_ru: В половине седьмого вечера. Приходи пораньше повеселиться.
sentences.text_translation_en: Six thirty in the evening. Come early to hang out.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 好。我给你买一个生日蛋糕。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo. Wǒ gěi nǐ mǎi yí ge shēng rì dàn gāo.
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi. Senga tug'ilgan kun torti olib kelaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо. Я куплю тебе торт ко дню рождения.
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay. I'll buy you a birthday cake.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Bú yòng mǎi, wǒ mǎi le.
sentences.text_translation: Sotib olishing shart emas, men oldim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не нужно покупать, я уже купил.
sentences.text_translation_en: No need to buy one, I already did.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那我给你准备一个礼物。
sentences.pinyin: Nà wǒ gěi nǐ zhǔn bèi yí ge lǐ wù.
sentences.text_translation_en: Then I'll prepare a gift for you.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Zhēn de ma? Tài kāi xīn le!
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo, wǒ sòng nǐ yí shù huā.
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi, senga bir dasta gul sovg'a qilaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо, я подарю тебе букет цветов.
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay, I'll give you a bunch of flowers.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Xiè xie nǐ! Míng tiān jiàn!
sentences.speaker: B
